data.name: Waifu by Myside: Patch Me In
data.detailed_description:
You’re about to dive into an erotic visual novel with point-and-click elements — except the story breaks before you even read the first line of dialogue. You launch the game expecting gorgeous girls and a flood of spicy scenes, but everything immediately falls apart: the interface glitches, the music stutters, and Candy — a character who should be following a fixed script — suddenly speaks directly to you.

Your task is to explore corrupted worlds buried under layers of abandoned source code and meet alluring girls who were never supposed to exist in this game at all. Don’t let them fool you… because beneath all the sex and seduction lies someone’s hidden agenda.

Meanwhile, Candy grows more persistent. She rewrites dialogues, hijacks events, and closes paths as if she’s trying to control every step you take. And the deeper you go, the clearer it becomes: the game isn’t just broken…

…it’s trying to rewrite you.
data.about_the_game:
You’re about to dive into an erotic visual novel with point-and-click elements — except the story breaks before you even read the first line of dialogue. You launch the game expecting gorgeous girls and a flood of spicy scenes, but everything immediately falls apart: the interface glitches, the music stutters, and Candy — a character who should be following a fixed script — suddenly speaks directly to you.

Your task is to explore corrupted worlds buried under layers of abandoned source code and meet alluring girls who were never supposed to exist in this game at all. Don’t let them fool you… because beneath all the sex and seduction lies someone’s hidden agenda.

Meanwhile, Candy grows more persistent. She rewrites dialogues, hijacks events, and closes paths as if she’s trying to control every step you take. And the deeper you go, the clearer it becomes: the game isn’t just broken…

…it’s trying to rewrite you.
data.short_description: A simple erotic visual novel — right up until the moment you launch it. Your dream waifu suddenly starts acting strange: watching you too closely, hiding something she shouldn’t. Now you must uncover what happened to the game — and what Candy is truly planning…
data.supported_languages: 俄文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
